name: HEVC-to-HLS background worker
description: Implement a background worker that transcodes HEVC video files to HLS format for browser playback using FFmpeg.
acceptance_criteria: internal/worker/ package with a transcoding worker
Converts HEVC files to HLS (m3u8 + ts segments) using FFmpeg
Watches for new uploads or processes on-demand
Outputs HLS files alongside originals in the storage path
Handles errors gracefully (FFmpeg not found, corrupt files)
Unit tests cover transcoding logic and error cases
go build and go vet pass cleanly
